description_long: This armchair features a wide, boxy frame with exposed wooden armrests and a matching wooden base, giving it a modern and robust appearance. The seat and back are generously cushioned with thick, plush, white upholstery, accented by subtle brown piping along the seams. Two large backrest cushions and a central square cushion provide ample comfort and support. The sides and back are fully upholstered in the same white fabric, bordered by the wooden frame, which adds a touch of warmth and contrast. The armrests are flat and broad, constructed from a medium-toned wood that appears smooth and sturdy. The overall design is contemporary, inviting, and suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern armchair with a wooden frame, white plush cushions, and broad, flat wooden armrests. The design is boxy, comfortable, and visually striking with contrasting materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, three plush white cushions, and the flat wooden armrests framing the chair.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick seat and back cushions, the depth of the chair, and the wooden armrest's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fully upholstered white back panel bordered by the wooden frame, with the tops of the cushions visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest, cushion depth, and the clean lines of the upholstery.
attribute_armrest_design: flat, wide, wooden armrests with a rectangular profile
attribute_backrest_style: medium-height, straight backrest with three large, loose cushions
attribute_leg_type: no visible legs; base appears as a continuous wooden frame
attribute_upholstery_pattern: solid color with subtle piping accents
